overview.description: The Monarch Volume Factor Dividend Tree ETF (MVFD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Monarch Volume Factor Dividend Tree index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index comprised of US equities that are exhibiting positive cash flow and dividend-paying capabilities. The fund can toggle to short-term US Treasury securities when cash flow trend is negative. MVFD was launched on Mar 6, 2024 and is issued by Monarch.
infoTable: Monarch Volume Factor Dividend Tree Index
